findings.detail: 15 template choices feels like a lot to scan at once
findings.proposed_solution: Group the template chips into clearer categories like Calm, Clinical, and Luxe

findings.detail: Only 3 palette options may feel a bit limiting if none fit the brand right away
findings.proposed_solution: Show a tiny preview on hover so I can tell styles apart faster
